techniques.name: Context-Aware Touch Authentication
techniques.description: Authentication technique that combines password authentication with point-in-time implicit authentication based on touch dynamics and gestures. Uses context information (specifically body posture) to dynamically choose the implicit authentication model to use to improve robustness and reliability.
sources: @article{wangContextAwareImplicitAuthentication2019,  title = {Context-{{Aware Implicit Authentication}} of {{Smartphone Users Based}} on {{Multi-Sensor Behavior}}},  author = {Wang, Renzhong and Tao, Dan},  year = {2019},  journal = {IEEE Access},  volume = {7},  pages = {119654--119667},  issn = {2169-3536},  doi = {10.1109/ACCESS.2019.2936034}}
